nodes.content:
🏦 BDO Bank Financing Available!

For qualified buyers:
• Up to 70% loan-to-value
• Terms: 15-20 years
• Competitive rates
• Processing: 3-5 business days

Let's check your eligibility.

Quick qualification check:

1. Are you a Philippine citizen or PR?
2. Do you have steady income (business/employment)?
3. Available for down payment? (30% = ~PHP 8.4M)

Answer yes/no to each.

📊 BDO Financing Terms:

Loan: Up to PHP 19.6M (70% of PHP 32.5M)
Down payment: PHP 8.4M (30%)

Rate: ~5.5-6.5% p.a. (subject to approval)
Term: 15-20 years preferred
Monthly payment: ~PHP 154K-185K

Monthly income: PHP 395K (Airbnb)
Net: PHP 210K-241K after financing

Does this work for you?

No problem! Cash buyers welcome too.

Next steps:
1. Review investment prospectus
2. Schedule property tour
3. Finalize purchase

Can we schedule a tour?
